trait.name: Brutal Momentum
entries: If the sever-axe moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with an Axe attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) slashing damage and must succeed on a {@dc 15} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The sever-axe makes two Axe attacks.

action.name: Axe
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 1d12 + 6}) slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) cold damage.

action.name: Suppressive Hook (Recharge 6)
entries: The sever-axe makes one Axe attack. On a hit, the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or it can't take reactions until the start of its next turn and its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.
